title: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons
notes:
The steam version of the game will play with the steam version of wine. Just not launched through the UI.
winetricks install these resources: 
corefonts dotnet40 tahoma
This will allow command line launching of the game with:
WINEPREFIX= ~/.local/Steam/SteamApps/compatdata/225080 ~/.local/Steam/SteamApps/common/Proton\ 3.7/dist/bin/wine  ~/.local/Steam/SteamApps/common/Brothers\ -\ A\ Tale\ of\ Two\ Sons/Binaries/Win32/BrothersLauncher.exe
Game does not start.

title: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons

notes:
1) Installed the game normally, launched once. After autoinstalling all the necessary dependancies the game still won't launch.
2) Ran "WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/225080/pfx winetricks -q corefonts dotnet40 tahoma". Ran again to confirm they were installed properly - "X already installed, skipping".
3) Game will now launch as usual, albeit after 2 wine error pop-ups. Occasionally will instead launch in a small window, min-maxing will move the game fullscreen.
4) Didn't test beyond launching the game, starting a new playthrough and a couple of minutes into prologue.

notes:

title: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons

notes:
Tried the same winetricks as suggested by others and after a couple rundll errors, the game launched perfectly fine.
It is worth pointing out that you should adjust the winetricks command to accommodate your steamapps location if it isn't in the default.  And, if it fails to run, try re-installing dotnet40.  For whatever reason, that failed to install the first time around, but worked fine the 2nd time.
title: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons

notes: Works perfectly after installing the game and, then, running on terminal the command: WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/225080/pfx winetricks dotnet40
title: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons

notes: Using the winetricks dotnet40 command worked for me after running it twice. As others have said, your path may vary if you don't install your games in the default location.
title: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons

notes: Game only runs after installing dotnet40 two times. I used the command "protontricks 225080 --force dotnet40". Tried to play when installing only one time but it was not enough, had to do it twice. There is a minor graphical glitch on the upper left corner, it is a minor graphical corruption that happens sporadically, it is small and not game breaking. Steam gives two options when launching the game. The option "Brothers launcher" does not work. Controller (DualShock 4) works fine.
